# PDF Studio Bot

Your personal PDF assistant on Telegram. Fast, secure, and multi-language.

## Features

- **Download from URL**: Convert any webpage to PDF by just sending the link.
- **Add Password**: Secure your documents with strong encryption.
- **Remove Password**: Decrypt protected PDFs if you have the password.
- **Split PDF**: Separate documents into individual pages.
- **Merge PDFs**: Combine multiple PDF files into one.
- **PDF to Images**: Convert PDF pages into high-quality images.
- **AI Summary**: Get concise summaries of your PDF documents using advanced AI.
- **Multi-language Support**: Available in English, Spanish, and Portuguese.

## Get Started

Open the bot on Telegram: [https://t.me/PDFStudio_bot](https://t.me/PDFStudio_bot)
Source Code: [https://github.com/gabrielrufino/pdf-studio-bot](https://github.com/gabrielrufino/pdf-studio-bot)
